reviews.comment:
La verdad x ser el ACA central un desastre la atención del playero..una cola terrible para cargar y cuando llegamos al surtidor ni m pregunto si soy socio..no m dio la atención q uno se merece..y eso q era las 23 hs

(Translated by Google)
Honestly, being the main ACA station, the service from the attendant was a disaster. There was a terrible line to fill up, and when we got to the pump, he didn't even ask if I was a member. He didn't give me the attention I deserve, and it was 11 PM!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25vME1YWjFlR05pU1hGalVFUlJjMU4yZUU1cFlVRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Sin perdidas de tiempo.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. No wasted time.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xRd0xUVlNjazVVV25OMlpVTXhObU5FY0hJMkxVRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cargue nafta y me ofrecen limpiar los vidrios….acepto y quedo peor que sin limpiarlo. Luego voy al full…sucio pisos y mesas todo manchado, sin música, caramelera vacías y todo desordenado
Heladeras vacías
Solicitó el café con pan huevo y queso y que paso? NO TIENEN, me ofrecen el sándwich neto y me dieron algo INCOMIBLE gomoso para olvidar, una porquería
Espero que sirva para mejorar la experiencia

(Translated by Google)
I filled up with gas and they offered to clean the windows… I accepted, and they ended up looking worse than if I hadn't cleaned them at all. Then I went to the full station… dirty floors and tables, everything stained, no music, empty candy displays, and everything a mess. Empty refrigerators. I ordered coffee with bread, egg, and cheese, and what happened? They didn't have any. They offered me a plain sandwich, and they gave me something inedible, rubbery, and I'd rather forget it—a disgrace. I hope this helps improve the experience.

reviewReply.comment: Le pedimos disculpas el sandwich es keto lo que nos proveen de ka franquicia lo más similar a lo que ud pedía gracias
